description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a matte black finish and a streamlined, tactical design. The barrel is relatively short and cylindrical, featuring subtle ribbing along the top, and the receiver is integrated smoothly into the body. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard that is elongated and curves into the lower frame, providing ample space for the fingers. The shotgun lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a pistol grip that extends downward and slightly backward, enhancing maneuverability in close quarters. There is a visible safety or action lever on the left side above the grip, and the overall construction appears robust, likely made from a combination of metal and polymer. The design is minimalistic, with no visible external magazine or shell port, emphasizing a sleek, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black shotgun with a short barrel, ergonomic pistol grip, and elongated trigger guard, designed for tactical use. The body is streamlined and robust, with minimal external features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and ribbed top, with the grip and trigger guard barely visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the short barrel, integrated receiver, ergonomic pistol grip, and elongated trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ribbed top of the receiver and the back of the pistol grip, with minimal detail on the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the short barrel, smooth receiver, and the distinctive grip and trigger guard.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbing along the top and a short, cylindrical profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a wide opening and integrated finger groove
